title: Converge active RepoGround names and metadata without rewriting history
goal: Replace active Lenskit, rLens and RepoBrief product-identity references in Metarepo, Systemkatalog and current consumer documentation with RepoGround while preserving historical evidence, compatibility aliases and stable wire-contract field names.

acceptance.assertion: Every active fleet, catalog, entrypoint and current consumer reference to Lenskit, rLens or RepoBrief is classified as identity, compatibility alias, stable contract field or history.
Active product and repository identity uses RepoGround consistently in Metarepo, Systemkatalog and current documentation.
Completed tasks, receipts, archived documents, historical commits and quoted prior names are not rewritten.
Stable fields such as rlens_context_ref are renamed only through an explicit versioned schema migration with compatibility tests; otherwise they remain documented aliases.
Repository validation and affected consumer tests pass on exact reviewed heads with no broken links or missing fleet/catalog entries.

metadata.source_observation: Current Metarepo and Systemkatalog active text still contains Lenskit/RepoBrief identity while RepoGround is published and Bureau active bindings now use repo.repoground.
